name: Dan Carrier
abilities: ★ Hair of the Hog — passes the flask down the Truffle Hog line before every round; a nose beer, he swears, knocks strokes clean off. Handicaps drop at the first tee.
Root & Ruin. The hog devours what the Syndicate grows — slip a Mycelian a gram and five strokes bloom on their card. 2025 Pairs Champion with Jordo (the Double-D); handicap rooted down 30 → 26 → 21.
flavor: “Mushrooms add five strokes a gram; nose beers bring it right back down. I'm just balancing the books.”
caption: Dan Carrier · Truffle Hogs 🐗
